query:
-- 查询这2个用户的完整信息
SELECT 
  id as userId,
  name as userName,
  phone as userPhone,
  email,
  roles,
  role,
  isActive,
  createdAt
FROM users
WHERE id IN (13860029, 16800186)
ORDER BY createdAt;
